title: Force/Release merge + forceable directive
body:
I have merged my implementation of force/release and applied the changes we discussed separately. I then rebased the implementation of the forceable attribute that allows forcing from C++.

Your and my initial implementations were eerily similar. I picked up most stuff from mine though as the code is a bit more linear with fewer visitor classes and is a bit shorter. The functionality is the union, and I added the extra tests.

draft becaulse still todo:
- [x] Implement `forceable` metacomment
- [x] Document force to non-constant is not a continuous assignment like the IEEE requires
- [x] Update Changes
